name: Hate Free Heroes Tactics: Strategy Building MMO
short_description: Hate Free Heroes Tactics is a community based online game and adventure. Help your city reduce aggro levels by building your agency, defeating aggromites and researching new ways of keeping city aggro levels at a minimum. Play from any web browser, PC, tablet or phone.
detailed_description:
Get the RPG

https://store.steampowered.com/app/1690790


About the Game

The tactics mmorpg is no longer working and will no longer be supported. So sorry for this issue and we appreciate all the support the game had received. There were way too many flaws in the coding with some security risks we did not want to continue developing with the engine. The RPG works fine and can be played no problem but can be purchased separately. Please consider getting the RPG as it is the backbone of the series and is a great game! Do not buy the Tactics version and disregard any sales for it as it will soon be removed. Get the RPG here: https://store.steampowered.com/app/1690790
